intro.title: The minds behind CoreLab Analytics
intro.description: A research group from ITMAWD 12A at STI College Malolos exploring how computer-laboratory exposure shapes academic performance— and how to render that story in real-time, on the web.

advisers.name: Prof. Katrina Faith Esguerra
advisers.title: Practical Research Adviser
advisers.blurb: Provided guidance on the research paper, including methodology, instrument validation, and statistical analysis standards.

advisers.name: Prof. Alexander Venus
advisers.title: Computer Programming Adviser
advisers.blurb: Provided technical guidance and ideas for the development of the web-based research and visualization tool.

contact.title: Interested in the data?
contact.description: For collaboration or access to the full dataset, please reach the research team.
